name: Ferplast Pet Feeding Bwl M Mn Asstd
description: Key Features Sturdy Construction: Crafted from high-quality, extra-thick plastic for long-lasting use—even with daily wear and tear. Non-Slip Base: The integrated rubber base prevents sliding and tipping, ensuring mealtime stays mess-free, even for enthusiastic eaters. Thoughtful Design: A round top opening and a wider support base provide excellent stability. Select models include ergonomic side grips for easy lifting and refilling. Medium Size, Big Convenience: Designed to comfortably serve small to medium-sized pets with both food and water. Assorted Colors: Available in a range of vibrant and neutral tones, allowing you to mix, match, or color-code for multiple pets or décor styles. Eco-Conscious Manufacturing: Made using recycled plastic from industrial and post-consumer sources, contributing to sustainable living and reduced environmental impact. Easy Maintenance: Smooth surfaces make cleaning quick and hygienic—just rinse or wipe as needed. Versatile & Pet-Friendly Whether you're feeding a playful pup or a curious cat, the Magnus Medium Bowl delivers the reliability you need. Its anti-tip, anti-slip features make it especially suitable for pets that move around a lot during meals. Plus, the range of colors adds a cheerful, modern touch to your pet’s dining area. Ideal for: Daily feeding & watering Cats and small to medium-sized dogs Indoor use in kitchens, pet nooks, or feeding stations Eco-conscious pet owners
